description: This Bicycle Toe oxford from rockport called Alduna is a traditional silhouette paired with an elongated lace-up vamp. An absolute pleasure to wear and a must-have in the wardrobe of those who belive in stylish comfort, the Alduna range of shoes provide a snug Fit and look sumptuous with dress pants. Designed for elegance and comfort, it is engineered with DMX technology that generates air flow dynamically while you walk, creating a cushion for your feet, making it an absolute favourite for everyday wear.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added  strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the  hide Such leather upper also makes it easy to clean and enhances  shoe life Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive  rubbing and prevent blisters Elongated lace vamp with perforated tongue for extra snug fit and added ventilation Midsole Moulded footbed made of polyurethane (PU) for long term  wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned  comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm and  enhances support and flexibility to aid walking Outsole Flex grooves provide durable grip on various  surfaces Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock  absorption reducing foot fatigue Moisture absorbent, odour resistant cushioning keeps feet  dry and comfortable Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
